ddls:
CREATE TABLE "etf_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ETF category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the ETF category (e.g., VGT, Technology ETFs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ETF category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the ETF category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type (e.g., Management Fee, Other Expenses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the expense is recurring */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF category */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense type */,
  "expense_value" REAL /* Value of the expense (as a percentage) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was reported */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the expense value is estimated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the expense record was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the expense data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_expenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES etf_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etf_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF category */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Total Expense, Net Expense) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric (as a percentage) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was reported */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the performance metric is estimated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_etf_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES etf_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ETF category being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES etf_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
